loop1.title: Fuel Tank Anatomy
loop1.note: This is a static chrome card (asset_3d). No data fields are bound; the card renders its metadata frame with placeholder values until the 3D viewer or special renderer is populated.

loop1.title: All Runs (Fuel Log)
loop1.note: Showing total active energy (kWh) and load factor (%); fuel consumption (L) and specific fuel consumption (L/kWh) are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Fuel & Tank — Composite
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for fuel burn rate and energy import as a proxy for fuel level; specific fuel consumption and cost are unavailable for this asset.
